title: ROI gizmo for fine-tuning position, size, and rotation after drawing
capture_instructions: A 3D Box ROI has been drawn around a building in the Queens Campus point cloud. The box wireframe outline is visible. The 3D transform gizmo (colored axis arrows, plane handles, and scale handles on box edges/corners) overlays the ROI. Camera is at a 3/4 perspective to show all three axes of the gizmo clearly. The building points are visible inside the box.
ui_state: 3D Box ROI drawn, gizmo active, camera at 3/4 perspective, building points inside box

annotations.label: Gizmo center — drag for free 3D translation
Blue axis arrow (Z — drag to adjust height)
Edge scale handle — drag to resize box face
